aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks critical elements such as reviews, detailed content, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand service pages with detailed content, focusing on local keywords and user intent.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic contact information but lacks a consistent Google Business Profile (GBP) strategy.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has not fully leveraged GBP, which is crucial for local search visibility. Missing GBP optimization and engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on the website but lacks widespread citations across directories.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and citations.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services and comparing options.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing for local search terms.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by creating informative blog content and engaging with the community.
